profile.headline: Software Engineer | Full Stack Developer | React, Node.js, AWS
profile.summary: Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience building scalable web applications and distributed systems. Proficient in JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, and cloud technologies. Passionate about creating performant user experiences and solving complex engineering problems.

experience.title: Software Engineer
description: Developed and maintained microservices handling over 2 million API requests daily.
Built React and Next.js applications improving page load speed by 40%.
Designed CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Docker.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver enterprise SaaS features.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
description: Implemented REST APIs using Node.js and Express.
Optimized SQL queries reducing response times by 35%.
Created reusable frontend components using React and TypeScript.

projects.name: Realtime Collaboration Platform
projects.description: Built a collaborative document editor using React, Node.js, WebSockets, and MongoDB supporting 10,000+ users.

projects.name: Cloud Cost Optimizer
projects.description: Developed analytics dashboards to monitor and optimize AWS spending.

achievements: Published technical articles with 50,000+ total views.
